scripts.build: pnpm --filter @pact-network/monitor build && pnpm --filter @pact-network/backend build && pnpm --filter @pact-network/scorecard build
scripts.test: pnpm run test:sdk && pnpm run test:backend
scripts.db:reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down -v && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d
